title: Bloom
description: A vanilla-style Overworld expansion featuring new & improved biomes, flora, blocks, crops & more.
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/TGbBb47Gr5) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459)

_Made as part of Legacies, with the aim of reimagining the core principles of vanilla Minecraft. Explore, adventure and survive in an all-new world. If you like Bloom, I highly recommend you **[check out Legacies!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacies)**_

Bloom is a vanilla-styled expansion upon many facets of the Overworld - from its flora to its biomes to even farming and caves. As such, Bloom features a plethora of new Biomes, flowers, blocks & more as detailed below.

### New Biomes

**Golden Forest**
- made up of new Golden Birch trees
- temperate biome that is placed between Forests and Taigas
- the ground flora features a plethora of shrubs, tulips, Goldenrods & more

**Golden Fields**
- sparse variant of the Golden Forest which borders on nearby plains

**Golden River**
- variant of Rivers which match the colors of Golden Forests

**Fen**
- swamp-like biome placed near Taigas
- consists of Birch & Spruce trees, alongside Reeds, Wildflowers & more

**Lavender Fields**
- rare plains variant which is typically placed in climates similar to Flower Forests
- features a substantial amount of Lavender, small patches of Alliums and sparse Oak and new Jacaranda trees

**Windswept Jungle**
- variant of Jungles that is placed in windswept terrain
- features a large amount of Rose Bushes, alongside Jacaranda trees

**Sparse Windswept Jungle**
- sparse variant of Windswept Jungles

**Pine Taiga**
- Taiga variant which has new Pine trees mixed in with Spruce trees
- generates adjacent to the newly-overhauled Old Growth Pine Taiga

**Snowy Pine Taiga**
- snowy variant of the Pine Taiga
- replaces Taigas in low-temperature regions

**Tropical River**
- muddy, Jungle variant of Rivers

**Tropical Beach**
- tropical-water-color variant of Beaches

**Warm Beach**
- Desert variant of Rivers featuring coarse dirt & dry grass

**Arid Shore**
- coarse dirt variant of Stony Shores which replaces them in Deserts / Badlands

**Lukewarm River**
- savanna-water-color variant of Rivers

**Lukewarm Beach**
- savanna-water-color variant of Beaches

**Cold River**
- Taiga variant of Rivers featuring a more fitting water colour and more Gravel

**Cold Beach**
- Taiga variant of Beaches made of Gravel instead of Sand

**Snowy Shore**
- frozen variant of Stony Shores made of Dolerite

### Additional Flora

**Flowers**
- Hellebore (Taigas)
- Bromeliad (Jungles)
- Pink Orchid (Jungles)
- Bellflowers (Dark Forest, Flower Forest, Jungles)
- Hydrangea (Forest, Flower Forest, Cherry Grove, Golden Forest)
- Calla Lily (Savannas, Flower Forest)
- Dianthus (Snowy Taiga, Snowy Plains, Snowy Pine Taiga)
- Goldenrod (Sunflower Plains, Golden Forest)
- Orange Daisy (Old Growth Birch Forest)
- Scilla (Snowy Taiga, Snowy Plains, Ice Spikes, Windswept Forest, Windswept Hills, Windswept Gravelly Hills, Snowy Pine Taiga)
- Hyacinth (Dark Forest, Swamp, Fen)
- Queencup (Windswept Hills, Windswept Forest, Windswept Gravelly Hills)

**Bushes**
- Succulent (Badlands)
- Reeds (Swamp, Fen)

**Pine Trees**
- all-new Pine Trees replace vanilla's Pine Trees with a new woodset
- these are used in a plethora of places, from Old Growth Pine Taigas to Groves

### Underground Variation

**Biome Depth**
- Andesite is the base stone below cold-temperate regions such as Taigas
- Diorite is the base stone for high-y-level tropical regions (such as Windswept Jungles)
- Granite is the base stone for arid regions such as Savannas
- Dolerite is the base stone for freezing regions (wherever it can snow)
- Sandstone extends deeper in Deserts
- Red Sandstone extends deeper in Badlands

**Dolerite**
- the new base stone type in freezing (snowy) regions
- has Polished, Brick and Tile variants

**Ore Variants**
- ore variants have been added for Andesite, Diorite, Granite, Tuff, Sandstone, Red Sandstone & Dolerite
- ore variants are for each Overworld ore, with modded support for Legacies and Legends' Sapphire

### Farming

**Cotton**
- seeds are found in Jungle Temples, Dungeons & Woodland Mansions
- drops Cotton & Cotton Seeds when fully grown
- Cotton can be crafted into Yarn
- Yarn can be used to make Sleeping Bags, which allow you to sleep without setting your spawn
- Yarn can be used to make Rugs, which are like a Carpet version of Glazed Terracotta wherein each Rug color has its own unique pattern
- Yarn can be crafted into String or sold to Shepherds

**QOL**
- hoes can be right-clicked on fully-grown crops to instantly harvest and replant them

### Misc Tweaks

**Water & Foliage Colors**
- Taigas and related biomes now use unique water colors
- Savannas and related biomes now use unique water colors, alongside tweaked foliage colors
- Deserts and related biomes now use unique water colors
- Jungles and related biomes now use unique water colors
- freezing biomes now have a darker water color

**Extra Biome Tweaks**
- Coarse Dirt Patches (Savannas, Golden Forest)
- Underwater Mud (Swamps, Jungles)
- Water-level Mud (Swamps)

**Music**
- Lock and Key plays in Golden Forests and Taigas

### Config

Everything is configurable. Much of Bloom is configured by a regular json / in-game config, however to modify whether or where certain features (such as new flowers) can spawn, you must create a datapack to edit the biome tags listed [here](https://github.com/Rebel459/bloom/tree/main/src/main/generated/data/bloom/tags/worldgen/biome).

**Default Config**
```
{
	"biomes": {
		"golden_forest": true,
		"golden_fields": true,
		"golden_river": true,
		"fen": true,
		"pine_taiga": true,
		"snowy_pine_taiga": true,
		"lavender_fields": true,
		"windswept_jungle": true,
		"sparse_windswept_jungle": true,
		"arid_shore": true,
		"warm_river": true,
		"cold_beach": true,
		"cold_river": true,
		"lukewarm_beach": true,
		"lukewarm_river": true,
		"snowy_shore": true,
		"tropical_beach": true,
		"tropical_river": true
	},
	"worldgen": {
		"improved_taiga_placement": true,
		"taiga_tweaks": true,
		"pine_trees": true,
		"stony_cliffs": true,
		"ore_variants": true,
		"stone_variant_depth": true,
		"sandstone_depth": true,
		"dolerite_depth": true
	},
	"farming": {
		"hoe_replanting": true,
		"cotton": true
	}
}
```
